rules.summary: Match the discard by shape or number. Whot 20 calls the next shape. Depending on the house setup, Pick Two and Pick Three may stack, mix, or be unblockable; action cards may be barred from winning a round. Hold On repeats a turn, Suspension skips, Star 8 may suspend two players, General Market makes opponents pick one, and optional card 11 reverses play. Players automatically call semi last card, last card, and check up. The first to three round wins takes the best-of-five game.
